column1: # Table 2. Context density ablation: validity vs coordination crowding.
# All runs use Ln fine-tuned checkpoint (epoch 48) with RePaint r=10 + projection.
# context_heavy_atoms: number of non-hydrogen atoms in the context (fixed) region.
# cn_context: coordination number contributed by the context ligands.
# valid_rate: fraction passing all validity checks (with 95% bootstrap CI).
# mean_bridges: mean inter-ligand bridges per structure (should be 0 with projection).
# mean_mutation: mean number of context ligands mutated per structure.
# NOTE: Data from Prompt 6 context ablation on MIT Engaging.
# Re-run analyze_context_ablation.py to regenerate from raw data.
